# Copilot instructions

Canonical guidance for this repository lives in [`../AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md).
All rules, launch protocol, Windows guardrails, precision/UX gates, and the
skills and agents index are defined there.

Per the `canonical-instructions` skill, do not duplicate rules in this file.
If a rule needs to change, edit AGENTS.md.

## Copilot-specific notes

Nothing at the moment. Add items here only if they apply **exclusively** to
GitHub Copilot tooling; everything shared with other agents belongs in
AGENTS.md.
